summary: Thin, mid‑boosted recording marred by heavy EQ; only a fragment of the show survives, leaving fans wanting more.
review: The sole review notes that the existing portion of this concert suffers from aggressive post‑EQ processing that makes it sound like it’s being run through an Ibanez Tube Screamer – thin and overly mid‑boosted. While the reviewer rates the set itself highly enough to give four stars, the technical shortcomings dominate the listening experience, and no specific songs or performance highlights are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review; reviewer gives a solid 4‑star rating but focuses on significant recording issues, leading to a moderately high overall score with medium confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Post‑recording EQ attempts produce a mid‑boosted, thin sound reminiscent of an Ibanez Tube Screamer; overall clarity is compromised by over‑processing.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Only a fragment of the concert exists, so flow and pacing cannot be assessed.
